metadata.title: GoalOS Mainnet Contract Atlas V17
metadata.publicAlphaBoundary: No user data. No user funds. No wallet. No transaction. No network call. No production authority. Human review required.
metadata.tokenBoundary: $AGIALPHA public contract address only. Not available from us. No sale. No custody. No wallet support. No investment, trading, legal, tax, exchange, bridge, liquidity, or regulatory advice.

contracts.name: AGIALPHA
contracts.railExplanation: Identifies the canonical AGIALPHA contract. GoalOS did not deploy or mint a replacement token.
contracts.boundaryNote: External canonical AGIALPHA contract used for identification. GoalOS did not deploy or mint a replacement AGIALPHA token.

contracts.name: CommercializationPerformanceVault
contracts.railExplanation: Vault contracts organize reserved resources and treasury-like public accounting surfaces; no user-fund authorization is granted by this public-alpha site.
contracts.boundaryNote: GoalOS-created contract recorded in the v4.4.0 Ethereum Mainnet pre-release. Verified status comes from the release evidence; this is not production activation or audit completion.
